title: At Least To Pray Is Left, Is Left.
content:
At least to pray is left, is left.
    O Jesus! in the air
    I know not which thy chamber is, --
    I 'm knocking everywhere.

    Thou stirrest earthquake in the South,
    And maelstrom in the sea;
    Say, Jesus Christ of Nazareth,
    Hast thou no arm for me?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "At Least To Pray Is Left, Is Left."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
